case_title: PANDORA LEE et al VS. EUN KYOUNG CHOI et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF ANDREW LEONG. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TIFFANY CRIGER--ESCROW ASSISTANT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY KOREAN INTERPRETER--YU MI-KONG. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
